headline: Keefe, Bruyette & Woods Maintains Market Perform on Prudential Financial, Raises Price Target to $113
summary: Keefe, Bruyette & Woods  analyst Ryan Krueger   maintains Prudential Financial (NYSE:PRU) with a Market Perform and raises the price target from $106 to $113.
